mapper.sql: id, year, proj_type, title, is_ethic, expert_list, ethic_expert_list, sub_user_id, sub_date, data_status, audit_status, check_result, audit_date, check_desc, sys_no, out_expert_result, ethic_result, pre_auditor, pre_audit_state, pre_audit_desc, pre_audit_date, phone, email, is_human_genetic_res_required, head, contacts, resch_category, indic_range, participation_type, sub_dept, leader_dept, involved_dept, funds, discipline, research_field, fina_chk_result, fina_chk_desc, fina_chk_user_id, fina_chk_date_time, project_apply_info, division, project_class, creator_name, applier_edu_level, applier_title, planed_end_date_, early_research_info, approval_status, project_source_unit, project_keyword, project_apply_type, first_unit_type, file_ids, avg_score, agree_count, avg_score2, agree_count2, apply_book_type, class, subuser_name, creator, create_time, apply_id, note, progrp, ranking, type
mapper.select:
select spst.id as rowId,spst.title as title,spst.project_apply_info as projectApplyInfo,spai.name as projectApplyInfoName, cspabt.code as "applyBookType.id",cspabt.name as "applyBookType.name",cspabt.name as applyBookTypeName, cspt.code as "projType.id",cspt.name as "projType.name",cspt.name as projTypeName, spst.classCode as classCode,spst.first_unit_type as firstUnitType, csy.code as "year.id" ,csy.name as "year.name",csy.name as yearName, huser.id as "head.id",huser.name as "head.name",huser.name as headName, spst.project_apply_type,sdept.id as "subDept.id",sdept.name as "subDept.name",sdept.name as subDeptName, spst.is_ethic as isEthic,spst.phone as phone,spst.project_keyword as projectKeyword,spst.email as email, spst.sub_date as subDate,spst.project_source_unit as projectSourceUnit,spst.planed_end_date as planedEndDate, spst.contacts as contacts,fdiscipline.code as "discipline.id",fdiscipline.name as "discipline.name",fdiscipline.name as disciplineName, spst.funds as funds,spst.research_field as researchField,spst.early_research_info as earlyResearchInfo, spst.note as note,spst.data_status as dataStatus, spst.header_audit_status as headerAuditStatus, spst.pre_audit_state as preAuditState,spst.audit_status as auditStatus,spst.project_apply_info as projectApplyInfo, csrf.code as "researchField.id",csrf.name as "researchField.name",csrf.name as researchFieldName
from srm_project_solicit spst left join ct_srm_project_apply_book_type cspabt on cspabt.code=spst.apply_book_type left join ct_srm_proj_type cspt on cspt.code=spst.proj_type left join ct_srm_year csy on csy.code=spst.year left join ct_srm_dept sdept on sdept.id=spst.sub_dept left join ct_srm_user huser on huser.id=spst.head left join srm_project_apply_info spai on spai.id=spst.project_apply_info left join ct_srm_discipline fdiscipline on fdiscipline.code=spst.discipline left join ct_srm_research_field csrf on csrf.code=spst.research_field where spst.id=#{rowId}
mapper.update:
update srm_project_solicit
data_status = #{status},
audit_status = #{auditStatus},
pre_audit_state = #{preAuditState},
header_audit_status = #{headerAuditStatus},
sub_user_id = #{subUserId},
sub_date = #{subDate},
where id=#{rowId}
